Who I Am

About Me

4+
Design Projects
3
Animations
1
Sem
of Learning
∞
Creativity

Hi! I'm DAVE A. GALLETO, a student designer passionate about crafting meaningful visual experiences. Through Free Elec 1, I've explored the fundamentals of graphic design and animation — from building a personal brand to bringing ideas to life through motion.

My creative journey is rooted in a love for clean aesthetics, purposeful composition, and storytelling through visuals. I believe that great design is not just how things look, but how they make people feel.

Creative Goals: To grow as a visual communicator, continue refining my design sensibilities, and eventually build experiences that are both beautiful and functional — especially as I prepare for Prof Elec 2 - Web Systems and Technologies next semester.

Personal Vision: To use design as a language that bridges creativity and purpose, always pushing toward work that is original, intentional, and genuinely mine.

Graphic Design Adobe Illustrator Adobe Animate Canva Typography Motion Tween Frame-by-Frame Branding Layout Design Visual Storytelling
